rows.label: tev012501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Peter about the work that the Pathfinder do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Peter if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Peter about Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Peter about Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Peter about FrontierNet's
installation progress.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0001
rows.name: What's this? Another fan?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Well, I suppose it's inevitable that a
man as handsome and skilled as myself
would attract this sort of attention.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Regardless, I always strive to be courteous
to my fans, so I'll answer your question
about my body of work with the Pathfinder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0005
rows.name:
Our primary duty is to range throughout
Mira and install data probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0006
rows.name:
After all, without our efforts to expand FrontierNet
with these probes, BLADE would be hard pressed to
make any progress in their survey of the planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0009
rows.name:
And so, as FrontierNet expands,
missions that were not previously
available become possible to pursue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0010
rows.name:
That sets the stage for completing important
objectives such as seeking out possible
locations of parts of the Lifepoint.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0011
rows.name:
It is a grueling and dangerous
job, but for the sake of humanity's
future, pursue it I must![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0014
rows.name:
That idiot Bates has installed his data
probe in the wrong place yet again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0015
rows.name:
And so it falls upon me to go out
there and correct his mistake. How I
tire of dealing with rank amateurs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0016
rows.name:
This will be quite the expedition! But I hope I might find
unexplored territories and scenic viewpoints along the
way, giving me chances to toast the majesty of nature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0017
rows.name:
I pray that you also make the time to
relax during your missions. There's no
need to exhaust yourself out there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0025
rows.name:
There's an enormous stone bridge
known as Big Arch in the northern
part of Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0026
rows.name:
Apparently there's a FrontierNet probe
placement site at the start of that arch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0027
rows.name:
But to reach it, you need to
ascend from the Aaroy Plain base
camp and cross the Twin Arches.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0028
rows.name:
And that area is reported to be
firmly under the Growth's control.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0029
rows.name:
What a grueling job that will be! If you're
intending to take it on yourself, make sure
you're well-prepared for the effort.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0044
rows.name:
There's a natural bridge formation known
as the Great Trident Crossing in the
northern part of Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0045
rows.name:
That leads to the dangerous Hushflood
area, which is a major indigen habitat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0046
rows.name:
And yet, there seem to be numerous
FrontierNet probe placement sites
along the banks of that stream.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0047
rows.name:
Why must reaching FrontierNet probe
sites always be such a bother?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0048
rows.name:
The Poindexters who calculate
their locations must truly have
it out for us Pathfinder![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0063
rows.name:
Thanks to your hard work and the exertions
of us Pathfinder, an impressive amount
of data probes have been installed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0064
rows.name:
Just as America was rapidly stripped of its
mystery by its ever-spreading colonists, so
too will the uncharted wilds of Mira be tamed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0065
rows.name:
It makes me a little sad to think
of it, and not only because we
Pathfinder will soon be out of a job![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0066
rows.name:
Perhaps we should make the most of it by opening
tour companies and leading the people of NLA
to some of Mira's rarely-seen sights...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Peter about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0067
rows.name:
My deepest thanks to you. Your
victory over Bates has filled
my pockets and heart alike.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0068
rows.name: Hmm? You look confused...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0069
rows.name:
Were you unaware that the
members of Team Corondas had
been wagering on the outcome?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0070
rows.name:
But I'm calling it a win-win. Bates returned
with his life, and I won a substantial sum.
You really have come in quite handy, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0073
rows.name:
You must let me buy you drink a sometime.
Really, it's the least I could do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Peter about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0074
rows.name:
Even the stoic Captain Corondas seemed
dispirited after that last incident.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0075
rows.name:
I joined Corondas because I thought
he would lead me to many new and
spectacular Miran sights.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0076
rows.name:
I can't allow him to roll over
and die so easily. We need him
to keep carrying the team![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0079
rows.name:
I am confident that our team will
continue to be at the forefront of
exploring Mira's uncharted lands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0082
rows.name:
And if we are ever attacked
like that again, we'll flee as
far as our feet can carry us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Peter about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0084
rows.name:
Team Corondas is no more, but I will
never forget our eminent captain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0085
rows.name:
We chased after him like children as he
led us to spectacular sights in his
pursuit of a new world for all humanity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0086
rows.name:
Thanks to him, we saw and experienced
things that we never could have otherwise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012501_MSG0089
rows.name:
That's why I don't think
anyone—even Bates—could regret
having been a part of his team.[ST:wait ]
